rows.label: tlk46320171_01_msg0001
rows.name:
This is the refugee camp distribution
center, but we only distribute rations
during the day. Are you travelers?

rows.label: tlk46320171_01_msg0002
rows.name:
By order of His Holiness
Marveni, we provide shelter
and sustenance to the needy.

rows.label: tlk46320171_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Yet lately, refugee protests
against the Holy See's Blade
policies have grown fierce...

rows.label: tlk46320171_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Many citizens have begun questioning
our charity, saying refugees should
be made to work for their share.
